---
id: water-cherenkov-pid-v0
order: 30
title: Water Cherenkov PID Benchmark v0
status: planned
summary: Placeholder dataset record for future Water Cherenkov particle-identification benchmarks based on ring topology, timing, and light-pattern features.
modality: water-cherenkov
version: v0
data_format: Water Cherenkov event-display records
access:
  type: pending
  url: null
schema_doc: schema.md
example_paths: []
facts:
  - label: Status
    value: Planned
  - label: Modality
    value: Water Cherenkov event records
  - label: Version
    value: v0
  - label: Access
    value: Pending
used_by:
  - water-cherenkov-particle-id
links:
  docs: null
  schema: /documentation/dataset-water-cherenkov-pid-v0-schema.html
bibliography: ../../bibliography.bib
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: mathjax
---

## Record status

This planned record covers Water Cherenkov particle-identification examples for OpenDC tasks. The dataset should make particle labels, event-display construction, timing fields, and detector-response assumptions visible.

## Access

The intended package command is:

```bash
pimm-data save water-cherenkov-pid-v0
```

Until the package is released, this command is a stable placeholder for examples and protocol drafts.

## Schema notes

The schema should define event-display views, timing summaries, particle-label taxonomy, calibration metadata, split names, and example loading code.
